# <repo> — agent navigation

Purpose:
One or two lines on what this repository is. (Scaffold — replace when a repo is created from
this template.) This repo is maintained as an agent-stewarded wiki by humans + AI agents
(Claude, Codex, Gemini).

Always read first (the canonical navigation layer):
- AGENTS.md                 universal agent contract (workflow + nav)
- docs/CANON.md             ground-truth register; what is true now vs. intended; locked decisions
- docs/LIBRARIAN.md         wiki schema and operations (the contract)
- docs/INDEX.md             map of content
- docs/project-status.md    live workstreams, backlog, decision log

Wiki tiers:
- docs/raw/        immutable intake sources; do not rewrite
- docs/            durable wiki pages (design, ADRs, guides) with frontmatter
- docs/memory/     crystallized facts (machine-local junction; gitignored)
- docs/audits/     unresolved human corrections (resolve, then move to archive/)
- docs/log.md      append-only wiki operations log (gitignored)

Core operations (shared zero-dependency Node scripts; same output for every agent):
- npm run wiki:start
- npm run wiki:ingest -- <source>
- npm run wiki:query -- "<question>"
- npm run wiki:lint
- npm run wiki:crystallize
- npm run wiki:compact-save
- npm run wiki:doctor

Links: page bodies use Markdown links (GitHub-friendly) or [[wikilinks]] — both are valid and
wiki:lint resolves both. Frontmatter relations use quoted [[wikilinks]].

Rule:
AGENTS.md is the single agent contract. Anything under .claude/, .codex/, .gemini/ (and
CLAUDE.md / GEMINI.md) are adapters only. Canon lives in docs/CANON.md and docs/LIBRARIAN.md.
If an adapter or a hook conflicts with them, trust the docs and open an audit in docs/audits/.

<!-- BEGIN ARCHONVII MANAGED BLOCK: nav -->
Doc system (generated from .agent/doc-map.yml by `npm run docs:render`):
- docs/CANON.md — High-density register of what is true for this repo now vs. intended, plus locked decisions — read first. (Scaffold — fill per repo.)

Generated surfaces (never hand-edit inside managed blocks):
- docs/INDEX.md [committed] regenerate: docs:render
- llms.txt [committed] regenerate: docs:render
- README.md [committed] regenerate: docs:render
- docs/STATUS.md [rendered] regenerate: docs:status
- CHANGELOG.md [release] regenerate: docs:changelog

Machine-checked docs (re-verified when owned paths change):
- docs/CANON.md owns: scripts/**, schemas/**, docs/adr/**
- docs/LIBRARIAN.md owns: scripts/wiki/**
- docs/adr/** owns: scripts/**
- docs/agent-process/doc-system.md owns: scripts/docs/**, scripts/doc-health/**, scripts/close/**, .agent/doc-map.yml
- docs/agent-process/doc-sweep.md owns: scripts/doc-sweep/**
- docs/template-library-inventory.md owns: templates/**, styles/**, examples/**, schemas/**

Required base docs (every repo carries these):
- AGENTS.md
- .agent/doc-map.yml
- docs/CANON.md
- docs/INDEX.md
- docs/agent-process/doc-system.md
<!-- END ARCHONVII MANAGED BLOCK: nav -->
